rag_rules: Use `assume "label": expression;` to express input assumptions.
Place assumptions and guarantees within an `annex agree { ... };` block.
generic_rules: Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names in contracts.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
Ensure AGREE expression types match the underlying AADL types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean expressions for boolean ports; avoid numeric conversions.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions.
Avoid range comparisons on Boolean or opaque data ports without a numeric scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope details beyond component type vs. implementation
